name: tts-cpp-bench-shim
description: vcpkg manifest for the tts-cpp standalone dev build (cmake -S tts-cpp -B tts-cpp/build).  Tells vcpkg to install the `ggml` port; the sibling vcpkg-configuration.json wires in the local overlay at cmake/vcpkg-overlay-ports/ggml/ which carries the Supertonic custom-kernel patches.  Used by tts-cpp/README.md §1's dev-build flow.
